name: Beate Uhse AG
summary: Beate Uhse AG, through its subsidiaries, provides adult lifestyle products. It offers love toys, lingerie, and wellness products through retail shops, catalogues, mailings, e-commerce, and wholesale distribution channels. The company operates 96 shops in 5 European countries. It also provides adult entertainment through online portals, such as MovieOn, HotcamsOn, PrivatPorno, and EnjoyOn in various languages. Beate Uhse AG markets and sells its products primarily under the Beate Uhse, Pabo, Adam & Eve, and Christine le Duc brands. The company was founded in 1946 and is based in Hamburg, Germany.
